W

WEDNESDAY - calendar.model.Weekday
 
WEEK - calendar.view.gui.SwingCalendarView.ViewMode
 
Weekday - Enum in calendar.model
Enum representing days of the week with single-character abbreviations.
WeekView - Class in calendar.view
Formatter for displaying events in a weekly view.
WeekView() - Constructor for class calendar.view.WeekView
 
withDescription(String) - Method in class calendar.model.CalendarEvent
Creates a new CalendarEvent with updated description.
withLocation(String) - Method in class calendar.model.CalendarEvent
Creates a new CalendarEvent with updated location.
withRecurrence(Weekday[]) - Method in class calendar.controller.parser.CreateEventParams.Builder
Sets the recurrence days for a recurring event.
withRecurrence(Weekday[]) - Method in class calendar.model.CalendarEvent.Builder
Configures the event as recurring with specified days.
withStatus(EventStatus) - Method in class calendar.model.CalendarEvent
Creates a new CalendarEvent with updated status.
withTimes(LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in class calendar.model.CalendarEvent
Creates a new CalendarEvent with updated start and end times.
